commit_message:
Added generic synthesis define to guard non synthesizable code in axi_if.sv Added generic synthesis define to guard non synthesizable code in axi_if.sv Added generic synthesis define to guard non synthesizable code in axi_if.sv

There is an existing guard pragma (synopsys translate_off) but this only works for synopsys tools. Using this common SYNTHESIS define that is also used in other files in Caliptra the guard is extended to other tools as well. 

One could argue that with this change th
